data.caption: Figure 1: Block Diagram of Graph Transformer with Laplacian Eigenvectors (λ) used as positional encoding (LapPE). LapPE is added to input node embeddings before passing the features to the first layer. Left: Graph Transformer operating on node embeddings only to compute attention scores; Right: Graph Transformer with edge features with designated feature pipeline to maintain layer-wise edge representations. In this extension, the available edge attributes in a graph is used to explicitly modify the corresponding pairwise attention scores.
